title: Yacht Rental in Bali: Costs, Seasons & Guide for 2026
html:
Setting off from Benoa Harbour, the calm waters of the Bali Sea offer a magnificent setting for a day afloat. A skippered yacht charter in Bali starts from around 12,000,000 IDR for a half-day trip on a motor yacht. BoatHire24 is the marketplace to find a skippered charter and compare verified boat listings.

Where to set off in Bali

Benoa Harbour is the main departure point for yacht charters in the south of Bali. Many skippered trips also begin from Padang Bai, a busy port on the east coast serving the Gili Islands. Serangan Island, just south of Sanur, provides easy access to the open sea. For those heading to Nusa Lembongan or Nusa Penida, launching from Sanur or Kusamba is common. Jimbaran Bay offers a sheltered start for sunset cruises. One option worth a look is the Maiora 26m for hire.

Which boat to rent

Choosing the right boat depends on your group size and budget. BoatHire24 lists a range of vessels, from small speedboats to large crewed yachts. Follow this guide to pick the one that suits you.

  1. Motor yacht, ideal for weddings and corporate events; accommodates up to 20 guests; from 15,000,000 IDR for four hours.
  2. Catamaran, spacious and stable for day trips; can take 30 guests comfortably; from 8,000,000 IDR for a half-day.
  3. Speedboat, perfect for quick island hopping; seats 10 to 15 guests; from 4,000,000 IDR for two hours.
  4. Traditional phinisi, offers a classic Indonesian sailing experience; carries up to 20 overnight guests; from 25,000,000 IDR for a full day.

One standout option is the Maiora 26m for hire, a luxury motor yacht that blends Italian design with spacious decks, ideal for special occasions in Bali.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Bali?

Boat rental prices in Bali vary widely, from 1,500,000 IDR for a shared tour to over 40,000,000 IDR for a crewed luxury yacht. You can also see more at check availability.

  • Shared tour: from 1,500,000 IDR per person for a three-hour trip to Nusa Lembongan.
  • Small motorboat half-day: from 3,000,000 IDR for a private outing with a driver.
  • Catamaran full-day: from 10,000,000 IDR for a 10-person cruise with lunch included.
  • Luxury crewed yacht (like the Maiora 26m): from 35,000,000 IDR for a full day, with captain and crew.

You can exactly find a skippered charter that matches your preferences and compare prices on BoatHire24.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Bali?

For most charter boats in Bali, no licence is required as a skipper is always provided by the operator, though bareboat rental may require a valid international licence.

Indonesia generally does not recognise foreign boating licences for bareboat charters, so most visitors use skippered vessels. BoatHire24 recommends that you confirm the exact licence requirements with the operator before booking.

Book your trip during the dry season, April to October, when the easterly trade winds create calm seas and sunny skies, perfect for exploring the coast.

At a glance

  • Price band: 1,500,000 to 60,000,000 IDR per day
  • Peak months: July and August
  • Trip length: two hours to overnight
  • Guest capacity: 10 to 30 guests
  • Currency: Indonesian Rupiah (IDR)

Questions about boat rental in Bali

Can I rent a boat in Bali for a day trip to Nusa Penida?

Yes, many operators offer day trips to Nusa Penida, approximately 15 nautical miles from Sanur, taking about 45 minutes by speedboat.

What is included in the price of a yacht charter in Bali?

Most charters include fuel, a skipper, crew, and standard catering, but premium drinks or specialised activities such as snorkelling gear may be extra.

Is it safe to rent a boat in Bali in the rainy season?

During the wet season from November to March, rough seas and sudden storms can make boating hazardous, so it is wise to book only with operators who prioritise safety and monitor weather closely.

Can I host a party on a rented yacht in Bali?

Yes, many yachts are available for events such as birthdays and corporate parties, though capacity limits and additional fees apply.

To understand the booking process and what to expect, you can review how boat rental works on the BoatHire24 platform. The system allows you to explore availability and compare options before confirming.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Bali and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
